tools_used: visual rendering of the provisioned petition URL
helpful: The snapshot supplied precise docket posture and timing.
The statpack supplied calibrated cert base rates.
Visual PDF rendering recovered the question presented and argument from the scanned petition.
gaps: The provisioned petition had no OCR text, requiring full-page visual review.
CourtListener lacked text for the current Eleventh Circuit opinion.
notes: The official retrieval path was sufficient to identify the lower docket and older related opinion; direct visual review of the exact petition URL was decisive because the provisioned text extraction was empty.
